subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Báqir! Thy cries of anguish, thy lamentations and thy plaintive sighs in separation from the Beloved of all worlds were heard by God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل باقر ضجیج و صریخ و حنینت در فراق محبوب آفاق اصغا شد حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @presence of; reunion with God, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
